Interface IRasterSdeStorage2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control RasterSDE storage.

[Guid("DDC9C0C4-0556-47B6-80E8-0CA036745441")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterSdeStorage2

The compression quality.

int CompressionQuality { get; set; }
